name: chr19_19q13_42_43_PRSS_family
description: 19q13.42-q13.43 distal SD-rich tail containing the PRSS (kallikrein / serine protease) family (PRSS57, PRSS1-like cluster, KLK family at 19q13.41 boundary), VSTM1, NLRP2/7/12 paralogs and the subtelomeric SD field of 19q. The 19q tail also harbours the very last KRAB-ZNF blocks (ZNF274, ZIM2, PEG3).

architecture.internal_structure: PRSS / KLK serine-protease paralog tandem clusters of 50-200 kb at 85-95% identity; NLRP paralog cassettes; subtelomeric duplicons shared with other chromosome tails; very high SD density characteristic of the chr19 distal tip.
